raw_consumer_statement: Received call from Mastercard that purchase of $ XXXX was attempted in XXXX XXXX FL XXXX I do not live in FL. They denied. Then received notice purchase of $ XXXX was attempted. Denied purchase and was told they would cancel card. After closing time received email from : XXXX thanking me for my order from XXXX in the amount of {$120.00}. I did not make this purchase. This Mastercard has a low credit of {$2000.00} and is only used when I need to order medicine for our dogs. Had not been used in probably for 3-4 months then all this pops up. Would appreciate help.
